FX.title: [USD/JPY] FLAT: Technical consolidation amidst mixed economic signals
tldr_points: US policy focus on Powell’s finale
Euro inflation surge weighs on USD
JPY buoyed by safe‑haven demand amid uncertainties
FX.excerpt: USD/JPY expected to trade sideways as Fed’s neutral stance and Eurozone inflation pressure create a friction zone.
FX.comment: USD/JPY lacks clear catalyst, remain flat until breakout.

STOCKS.title: [S&P 500] UP: AI Detects Support at MA20 as Fundamentals Turn Bullish
STOCKS.excerpt: Technical support aligns with bullish earnings outlook, suggesting a modest upside toward 5,350 amid Fed caution.
STOCKS.comment: Technical support aligns with bullish earnings outlook, suggesting a modest upside toward 5,350 amid Fed caution.

CRYPTO.title: [BTC/USD] UP: Institutional Backing Accelerates as Technicals Signal Oversold Correction
tldr_points: Czech central bank advocates BTC in sovereign reserves
RSI(14) dips to oversold, signaling near-term bounce
CRYPTO.excerpt: Bitcoin’s technicals align with institutional bullish calls amid macro uncertainty; key resistance at $68,000.
CRYPTO.comment: Bullish divergence on RSI and strategic institutional narrative offset short-term volatility risks.
